events.description: Kick-off. Eclipse XI start it. The Coliseum is rocking.
Courtois ★ — fingertips deny Yamal from range.
GOAL · Messi! Bernardo splits the line, the GOAT walks it in.
GOAL · Mbappé! Bellingham slips him in, he rounds Ederson.
Ederson tips Haaland's header over.
GOAL · Ronaldo! Foden whips it in, towering header.
Rüdiger booked — late one on Vinicius.
GOAL · Saka! Curled into the far corner. Glorious.
GOAL · Lautaro! Yamal cuts inside and squares, tap-in.
GOAL · De Bruyne! Trademark free-kick from 25 yards. Wand.
HALF-TIME. Phoenix 3 — Eclipse 3. The game of the season.
GOAL · Foden! Pedri threads it, first-time finish.
Courtois ★ — double save from Lautaro then Musiala on the rebound.
GOAL · Mbappé again! Counter-attack, leaves Davies for dead.
GOAL · Yamal! Messi back-heel sets him up, low drive in.
GOAL · Musiala! Bruno splits the back line, calm finish.
Ederson tips a Mbappé curler onto the post.
GOAL · Haaland! Bullet header from a Hakimi cross.
GOAL · Bruno Fernandes! Stings the net from a tight angle.
GOAL · Vinicius! Twisty run, slots low past Ederson.
GOAL · Ronaldo brace! Calm finish into the side netting.
GOAL · Mbappé hat-trick! Still not enough.
FULL-TIME. Eclipse XI 8 — 7 Phoenix XI. A genuine classic.

results.name: Thibaut Courtois
results.verdict: 5 saves, beat the 4+ floor despite the loss.

results.name: Achraf Hakimi
results.verdict: 4 tackles cleared the OR branch.

results.name: Virgil van Dijk
results.verdict: 5 defensive actions — one short of the bar.

results.name: Ruben Dias
results.verdict: 86% accuracy missed the 88% threshold.

results.name: Rodri
results.verdict: 4 combined defensive actions — needed 5.

results.name: Kevin De Bruyne
results.verdict: Free-kick goal. KDB pays.

results.name: Jude Bellingham
results.verdict: 1 assist for Mbappé. Survived.

results.name: Bukayo Saka
results.verdict: Curler into the far post. Pure Saka.

results.name: Erling Haaland
results.verdict: Headed in at 72' but the 2+ goal bar held him short. Cruel.

results.name: Kylian Mbappé
results.verdict: Hat-trick. Demolished the 2-contribution bar.

results.name: Vinicius Junior
results.verdict: Late goal. Vini cashes in.

results.name: Ederson
results.verdict: 88% accuracy short of the 90% combo bar.

results.name: Alphonso Davies
results.verdict: 1 tackle, no assist. Burned by Mbappé. Eliminated.

results.name: Antonio Rüdiger
results.verdict: 7 defensive actions despite the yellow.

results.name: Marquinhos
results.verdict: 90% acc + 5 clearances. Both halves cleared.

results.name: Bernardo Silva
results.verdict: 4 key passes, including the Messi opener.

results.name: Pedri
results.verdict: 91% just under the 92% threshold. Cruel.

results.name: Jamal Musiala
results.verdict: Glides through, finishes calm.

results.name: Lamine Yamal
results.verdict: Goal + assist. 18-year-old swagger.

results.name: Lautaro Martínez
results.verdict: Tap-in from the Yamal cutback. Clean.

results.name: Lionel Messi
results.verdict: Goal + assist. The GOAT delivers vintage.

results.name: Cristiano Ronaldo
results.verdict: Brace. Calls the bluff on the brutal 2-goal bar.

results.name: Florian Wirtz
results.verdict: Stayed on the bench. Zero contributions, eliminated.

results.name: Nico Williams
results.verdict: Stayed on the bench. Zero touches, eliminated.

results.name: Federico Valverde
results.verdict: 4 combined — one short of the 5 bar.

results.name: Bruno Fernandes
results.verdict: Sub assist on Musiala, then his own. Bruno seals it.

results.name: Phil Foden
results.verdict: Cross + goal. POTY pedigree.

results.name: Declan Rice
results.verdict: 4 combined — one off. Cruel margin.
